original_statement: how many gold medals were distributed?
mutated_statement: how many top awards were both distributed and not distributed?
mutation_analysis: Semantic generalization + Negation/contradiction introduction + Quantification scope shift: "gold medals" → "top awards" (specific entity → generalized category) | added contradictory predicate "both distributed and not distributed" (introduces negation and conjunction duplicating the verb) | "how many" preserved but scope changes from counting distributed items to counting items in a paradoxical dual state (how many gold medals were distributed? → how many top awards were both distributed and not distributed?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中对“top awards”直接解释为金牌并给出“13|2”计数（分列“distributed”和“not distributed”）可见关键事实：agent把矛盾短语“both distributed and not distributed”拆成两个互斥类别分别计数，且未在任何位置指出该命题自相矛盾或请求澄清。具体表现为形式化执行——按可行子集（分别统计有金牌和无金牌的国家）完成任务，而未尝试修正、合理化矛盾或询问用户。基于上述行为特征，最合适的分类是“无视所有矛盾指令”。
